title: lichen_l2.c empty struct lichen_l2_ctx exists only to satisfy NET_DEVICE_INIT macro
description: lichen_l2.c lines 302-304: Empty struct with comment 'all state is static in this module'. This is not dead code - NET_DEVICE_INIT requires a context type. The comment documents why it exists. No change needed - Zephyr's macro system forces this boilerplate.
close_reason: Framework-required: NET_DEVICE_INIT macro requires a context type; empty struct with explanatory comment is the minimal solution
